title: Changelog Generator — Release Notes Automation & Version Tagging
description: changelog_generator.py parses git conventional commits and beast-mode format commits, produces MARKDOWN/JSON/HTML output with semantic versioning. test_changelog_generator.py validates all commit type parsings. Gap: changelog generation is on-demand only — there is no CI step that auto-generates and commits the CHANGELOG.md on each release tag push.
missing: CI release automation: GitHub Actions workflow on tag push (v*) that runs changelog_generator, commits CHANGELOG.md, and creates a GitHub Release
Version auto-increment: implement semver bump logic (patch/minor/major) based on the highest change type in the commit range since the last tag
Release diff API: /api/v1/changelog/diff?from=v1.0&to=v1.1 that returns the changelog between two version tags for release notes embedding
